nasb.text: For You meet him with the blessings of good things; You set a crown of fine gold on his head.

esv.text: For you meet him with rich blessings; you set a crown of fine gold upon his head.

cnv.text: 你以美福迎接他， 把精金的冠冕戴在他頭上。

ccb.text: 你赐给他丰盛的祝福， 给他戴上纯金的冠冕。

csbs.text: 是的，你用美好的祝福迎接他， 把纯金的冠冕戴在他头上。
